purpose: Validate governed full-page OCR on two mixed federal and Illinois S-corporation packages
privacy: No taxpayer identifiers or extracted dollar values are included in this report.

documents.visual_review: passed representative federal and Illinois pages
passed representative federal and Illinois pages

findings: Full-page OCR achieved searchable text on all 38 pages.
A selective OCR pass was insufficient because existing and missing text layers were mixed.
The lossless searchable copies are approximately 2.76 to 2.79 times the original size.
OCR and archival size reduction must be treated as separate governed objectives.
Page-level subdocument classification is required before IRS and IDOR workflows are assigned.
next_actions: Validate extracted form and line values against representative pages.
Split federal and Illinois subdocuments without changing the originals.
Test a separate quality-controlled access-copy optimization profile.
Map federal data to IRS SOI cohorts and Illinois data to the future IDOR engine.
